title: Happy Mail
excerpt: Maybe it's just me, but for some reason happy mail that arrives on a Monday seems to be better than if it arrived on any other day. I was delighted to receive an unexpected check, a sweet thank you card…
body: Maybe it's just me, but for some reason happy mail that arrives on a Monday seems to be better than if it arrived on any other day. I was delighted to receive an unexpected check, a sweet thank you card (made by green-inspired) and the A Beautiful Mess book that I didn't expect to even ship from Amazon until tomorrow. Definitely helped brighten the start of the work week.
